user_text:
The process begins with receiving a production order. Once the order is received, the next step is to prepare the production order. After preparation, a decision is made. If the condition is true, the process continues with collecting raw materials. 

Following the collection of raw materials, the process moves to the cutting stage. After cutting, two tasks occur simultaneously: stitching and printing. These two tasks are independent and can be done at the same time. Once both stitching and printing are completed, the process proceeds to complete the production.

After production is completed, the quality of the product is checked. Following the quality check, a quality report is created. Based on the report, another decision is made. If adjustments are needed, settings are adjusted accordingly. If no adjustments are needed, or after adjustments are made, data is sent to the warehouse.

Once the data is sent to the warehouse, the process returns to the decision point after preparing the production order. If the condition is false at this decision point, the process ends.
output_text:
The process begins with receiving a production order. Once the production order is received, the next step is to prepare the production order. After preparation, a decision point is reached where the process checks a condition. If the condition is true, the process continues to collect raw materials.

Once the raw materials are collected, two activities occur simultaneously: stitching and printing. These two tasks are independent and can be performed at the same time. After both stitching and printing are completed, the process moves on to complete the production.

Following the completion of production, the quality of the product is checked. After the quality check, a quality report is created. Another decision point is reached where the process can take one of two paths. One path involves adjusting settings, after which the process returns to the previous decision point to check the condition again. The other path involves sending data to the warehouse, after which the process also returns to the previous decision point.

If the initial condition at the decision point is not met, the process concludes and ends.
